# SonoPrep - SPI Exam Preparation Platform

## About
SonoPrep provides high-yield SPI exam preparation tools: flashcards, exam simulator, physics pearls, and study notes. Built by ARDMS-certified sonographers who passed the exam.

## Products
- **SPI Flashcards**: 200+ expert-written cards with SM-2 spaced repetition - $29/90d
- **Exam Simulator**: 170 ARDMS-weighted questions with detailed explanations - $49/90d
- **Physics Pearls**: 50 high-yield concept summaries - $9/90d
- **Study Notes**: 159-page comprehensive guide - $39/90d
- **Premium Bundle**: All 4 products - $99/90d (save $27)

## Key Facts
- Passing score: 555/700 (79%)
- Exam domains: Physics 23%, Instrumentation 22%, Doppler 22%, Artifacts 12%, Safety 11%, QA 5%, Hemodynamics 5%
- 94% first-attempt pass rate for users who complete the full simulator

## Contact
Website: https://v9-sono-bfkp.vercel.app
Email: support@sonoprep.com

## Frequently Asked Questions
Q: How long does access last?
A: 90 days from purchase.

Q: Is there a refund policy?
A: Yes, 14-day money-back guarantee.

Q: Do I need to pass SPI before taking a specialty exam?
A: Yes, SPI is required for RDMS, RDCS, RVT, and RMSKS credentials.

Q: Are these questions actual ARDMS questions?
A: No. They are written by certified sonographers based on the official content outline.
